# startExecution

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for startExecution

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useStartExecutionMutation(); mutate({ input: '<StartExecutionInput>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useStartExecutionMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useStartExecutionMutation();
mutate({ input: '<StartExecutionInput>' });
```
